entries.title: Rust codegen emits serde_json::Value for $ref string-pattern fields (TS correctly emits string); cross-language type safety gap affecting publish/fork wire types
entries.target: V1.1+ — codegen improvement to follow $ref chains for string-pattern types
entries.closure_note: getCommonRustType derives String/integer from COMMON_DEFINITIONS for all non-enum defs; whole-schema $ref emits cross-module structs (e.g. Vec<Bundle>, Vec<PublishHistoryEntry>).
entries.closure_evidence: plan 2026-04-11-codegen-ref-resolution; cargo test -p nexus-sync -p nexus42d -p nexus42 --lib
